creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Mobile Broadband Service Provider Information Database

This package contains mobile broadband settings for different service providers
in different countries. The Package contains only informational files so it's
safe for distributions to grab updates even during feature freeze and
maintenance stages.

WWW: https://live.gnome.org/NetworkManager/MobileBroadband/ServiceProviders
WWW: http://packages.ubuntu.com/source/raring/mobile-broadband-provider-info

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new)

How-To-Repeat: 
Build log

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130529232000-55564/
